inputs.label: Number of People
inputs.businessContext: Total number of individuals using water (family, employees, etc.)

inputs.label: Shower Minutes per Day per Person
inputs.businessContext: Average shower duration per person per day in minutes

inputs.label: Shower Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Water flow rate of the shower head in liters per minute

inputs.label: Toilet Flushes per Day per Person
inputs.businessContext: Average number of toilet flushes per person per day

inputs.label: Flush Volume
inputs.businessContext: Water volume per toilet flush in liters (modern dual-flush ~6L)

inputs.label: Washing Machine Loads per Week
inputs.businessContext: Number of washing machine cycles per week (total for all people)

inputs.label: Water per Load
inputs.businessContext: Water consumption per washing machine cycle in liters

inputs.label: Other Daily Usage per Person
inputs.businessContext: Additional water usage per person per day (drinking, cooking, cleaning, etc.)
